channel.title: Portfolio on Juan Flórez
channel.description: Recent content in Portfolio on Juan Flórez

item.title: Afronaut | Concept
item.description: From a forgotten space program. This project is inspired by the photo essay Afronauts by the artist Cristina de Middel, recreating Zambia’s Forgotten Space Program.

item.title: Afronaut | Asset
item.description: Entirely done using Blender’s new sculpting tools, and the addon Retopoflow.

item.title: Masters in design | Spring 2020
item.description: A collection of four projects done during the spring semester of 2020 at the Royal Danish Academy, School of Design, Master of Game Design.

item.title: Niebla | Game Prototype
item.description: Fog of War Niebla is a game prototype about using the fog of war mechanic from traditional RTS games and adding dynamic elements to it.

item.title: Pieces | Code Project
item.description: Is a code project inspired by the watercolors of Thomas Girtin and other prominent painters from the 18th century.
